summary: Task Management Module tested - all backend APIs (15/15) and frontend features working correctly. CRUD operations, filtering, statistics, and version history all functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/tasks/statistics - Returns 7 stat values (total, pending, in_progress, completed, delayed, high_priority, urgent)
GET /api/tasks/department-stats - Returns department-wise task counts
GET /api/tasks - Returns list of tasks with proper structure
POST /api/tasks - Creates task with auto-generated sequential ID (TASK-XXXXX)
GET /api/tasks/{task_id} - Retrieves single task by ID
PUT /api/tasks/{task_id} - Updates task and increments version
GET /api/tasks/{task_id}/history - Returns version history with snapshots
DELETE /api/tasks/{task_id} - Soft deletes task
Task filtering by department works correctly
Task filtering by status works correctly
Task filtering by priority works correctly
Task search by title/task_id works correctly
Task ID not found returns 404
Sequential task ID generation verified
Employee dropdown shows 5 employees (Rahul Sharma, Priya Patel, Amit Kumar, Neha Singh, Vikram Reddy)
Task Management page accessible via sidebar under HR Management
Statistics cards display all 7 metrics (Total, Pending, In Progress, Completed, Delayed, High Priority, Urgent)
New Task button opens create modal
Create modal has all required fields (title, description, department, assigned_to, priority, task_type, dates, hours, remarks)
Task table shows 10 columns (Task ID, Title, Department, Assigned To, Priority, Type, Due Date, Status, Progress, Actions)
Edit button opens modal with pre-filled data
Edit modal shows Status and Completion % fields (edit-only)
Version History modal shows version entries with timestamps and snapshots
Task creation via UI works - stat count increases
Success toast appears on task creation
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created 14 TEST_ prefixed tasks. UI tests created 2 additional tasks. Employees dropdown populated with 5 sample employees.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task Management Module fully operational. API endpoints at /api/tasks/*, TaskManagementSystem class in backend/task_management.py, frontend page at TaskManagementPage.js. 4 sample tasks exist (TASK-00001 to TASK-00004) plus ~16 test tasks. Employee dropdown shows 5 employees: Rahul Sharma (Sales Manager), Priya Patel (Accountant), Amit Kumar (IT Support), Neha Singh (HR Executive), Vikram Reddy (Operations Lead).

backend_api.department_stats_endpoint: Working - returns array of dept stats
backend_api.list_tasks_endpoint: Working - supports filters (department, status, priority, task_type, search)
backend_api.update_task_endpoint: Working - updates fields and increments version
backend_api.get_history_endpoint: Working - returns version history with snapshots

frontend_ui.navigation: Working - accessible via sidebar under HR Management
frontend_ui.statistics_cards: Working - shows 7 colored cards with counts
frontend_ui.filter_dropdowns: Working - Department, Status, Priority, Type filters
frontend_ui.search_input: Working - searches by Task ID and title
frontend_ui.create_modal: Working - all fields including employee dropdown
frontend_ui.edit_modal: Working - pre-fills data, shows status/completion fields
frontend_ui.history_modal: Working - shows version entries with timestamps
